claims.correction: On the actual default path the per-attempt sleep is 4,4,4 s (floored at 4, never exceeding cap). Growth only appears once 2^(attempt-1) exceeds 4 (attempt>=4) or multiplier>1. Floor=4 / cap=10 characterization is correct; the '4->8->10' sequence is not.

summary: Note is largely accurate. One MISCITED file path (max_retry=16 is worker.py:223 not types.py) and one mechanism overstatement: with Pipecat's default multiplier=1 the backoff sequence is 4,4,4 not the stated 4->8->10 (which requires multiplier>=2); floor 4 / cap 10 are correct.
